name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA)
description: Standard terms for a mutual non-disclosure agreement that lets two parties exchange confidential information for an agreed purpose while protecting that information from unauthorized use or disclosure.

name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
description: Standard terms for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, covering access and use of the service, support, fees, data protection, warranties, and liability.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard terms for an early-stage collaboration in which a partner gets early access to a provider's product in exchange for feedback and participation in a design partner program.

name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
description: Standard terms defining uptime targets, availability calculations, and service credits, designed to be used together with the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement.

name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
description: Standard terms for engaging a provider to perform professional services and deliverables under one or more statements of work (SOWs).

name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
description: Standard terms governing the processing of personal data between a data controller and a data processor, including subprocessor relationships, security, and international data transfers.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard terms for licensing on-premise or self-hosted software, covering license grants, user accounts, support, fees, warranties, and liability.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard terms for structuring a business partnership between two companies, covering cooperation, obligations, feedback, and other shared responsibilities.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Standard terms for a short-term trial or evaluation of a product or service before a prospective customer commits to a longer-term commercial agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
description: Standard terms for HIPAA-covered entities and their business associates governing the permitted use and disclosure of protected health information (PHI).

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard terms that supplement an underlying agreement to govern the use of AI services, including input and output handling, restrictions, and disclosures.
